first_paragraph: ***Eupithecia subflavolineata*** is a [moth](/wiki/Moth "Moth") in the family [Geometridae](/wiki/Geometridae "Geometridae"). It is found in [Algeria](/wiki/Algeria "Algeria").[[2]](#cite_note-2)

***Eupithecia subflavolineata*** is a [moth](/wiki/Moth "Moth") in the family [Geometridae](/wiki/Geometridae "Geometridae"). It is found in [Algeria](/wiki/Algeria "Algeria").[[2]](#cite_note-2)
